title: anthemis biebersteiniana f. marschalliana
intro: Anthemis biebersteiniana f. marschalliana, also known as German chamomile, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. The health benefits of German chamomile include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Anthemis biebersteiniana f. marschalliana include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used topically or orally for therapeutic purposes.
